nextAction: P2 dry run: choose one candidate from watchlist and create a non-executing trade plan with entry size, split entries, stop-loss, and take-profit rules.
rules: Keep each single stock at or below 10% of total budget.
Diversify across at least 5 stocks over time.
Use 30%-30%-40% split entries and default -7% stop-loss.
Do not use leverage, margin, or credit trading.

history.summary: Cycle 1 initialized with budget 3,000,000 KRW, period 4 weeks, no preselected interests.
Recorded P1 watchlist from local reports: Samsung Electronics(005930), NAVER(035420), Hyundai Motor(005380 watch-only).
